name: Abyss Actors' Dress Rehearsal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のゲネプロ
desc: At the start of your Main Phase 1: Add 1 "Abyss Actor" card and 1 "Abyss Script" Spell from your Deck to your hand. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Abyss Actor" monsters.
eff: At the start of your Main Phase 1: Add 1 "Abyss Actor" card and 1 "Abyss Script" Spell from your Deck to your hand. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Abyss Actor" monsters.

summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
misc: At the start of Main Phase 1
